metric: Cumulative streams started (Optimism + Base combined), with $280M combined volume on those two chains. Protocol TVL ~$12.6M across all chains.
note: 49,394 streams on Optimism + 644,584 on Base = 693,978 combined. $280M combined volume on those two chains only. Protocol TVL $12.6M per DeFi Llama. No published total-value-streamed all-chain figure found. TVL represents SuperTokens in circulation, NOT cumulative streamed value.

$45.77B 30-day volume across all Uniswap versions (v2, v3, v4). DeFi Llama is the source; live page was not directly fetchable but the figure was surfaced by DeFi Llama's indexed data in search results.

130M+ messages confirmed as of March 2025. 2025 year-end blog cites 173% OFT growth and cross-chain leadership (70% of all cross-chain messages) but does not publish an updated cumulative message count in indexed text. Live figure on layerzeroscan.com/analytics/overview not fetchable. True current number likely higher but unconfirmed.

$68B all-time transfer volume shown on wormhole.com homepage. 1B+ messages all-time (milestone passed by mid-2024, still cited in 2025-2026 content). $2.17B/month via Portal bridge (Q1 2026 estimate, sourced from third-party). No confirmed standalone 30-day figure found from wormholescan.io directly.

$742.54M 30-day volume per DeFi Llama. Cumulative lifetime volume $28.6B–$35B (range from two separate sources; DeFi Llama says $28.6B cumulative, protocol/third-party marketing says $35B). 54% of daily active bridge users as of Jan 2026.

$8B in October 2025 (peak monthly, per LI.FI's own update). $5.2B in November 2025. Lifetime volume surpassed $60B as of December 2025. No March 2026 monthly figure found. October 2025 is the most recent specific number available. Use with caution as current-month figure.
